## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff of Prophecy client account from current team to new team members.](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is a technical product that prefers non-technical content, focusing on data integration and transformation within databases](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Client emphasizes product marketing perspective in SEO strategy; content must align with their narrative](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Communication preferences: executive summaries, skimmable updates, and focused interactions with specific team members](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Current workflow includes 6 articles/week (\~50,000 words/month), with detailed processes for topic selection, review, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

## Topics

### Client Background and Preferences

  - [Initially dissatisfied with strategy, emphasizing product marketing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Prefer SEO to feed into product marketing narrative](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Sensitive about certain topics (e.g., AWS, Snowflake)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Focused on data integration and transformation within databases](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Provide detailed edits and context for content improvement](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [6 articles per week, 1,800-2,000 words each (\~48,000-50,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Topics reviewed by Cody or Matt Turner](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Use of webinar content and survey data for article creation](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Image creation process: Claude for inline images, Figma for cover images](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Emphasis on conversions over top-line clicks in performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

### Communication and Reporting

  - [Monday: Send weekly updates](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Tuesday: Send agenda and Looker report (for Wednesday meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Wednesday: Client call](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Thursday: Send post-call notes](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Use executive summaries for high-level stakeholders (e.g., Mitesh)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Detailed communications with Cody (daily point of contact)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Key Client Contacts

  - [Cody: Daily point of contact, supportive and transparent](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Mitesh: Head of product marketing, prefers high-level summaries](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Matt Turner: Involved in topic review](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Content Approach

  - [Focus on pain points of data platform leaders and LOB/analytics leaders](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Utilize client's webinars and podcast content](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Align content with client's narrative: "It's not the tooling that's broken, it's the process"](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to connect with Ismail for detailed walkthrough of client processes](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Ehtisham to sync with Vivek on nuances of performance reporting and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [New team to review provided resources (Notion, Slack bookmarks, videos)](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Explore client's webinars and transcripts for deeper understanding of desired narrative](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Begin using new platform grid for Prophecy content creation](https://fathom.video/share/UEdW1DgnuzVA-aExxkMFPwxH9RuzqwFv?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
